form.formComment: Racing well. Freshened for 30 days. Last start won by 2.5 len this track in a LR on March 14 over 3600m in the wet defeating Saint Geny with 66.5kg at $9.90 in a hurdle. Start before finished fourth of 12 starters at this track in the LR on February 23 over 3600m, on rain affected going; 13 len behind Boystone with 65.5kg at $9.90. All set to make it two on the trot.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Resumes off a 37 day letup. Last start finished sixth of 8 starters at this track on March 7 over 3600m, on slow going 19 len behind Guadalquivir with 67kg at $36. Before that finished fourth of 9 runners at Cagnes-sur-Mer in the LR on January 4 over 3500m, slow track; 6 len behind Isaac Of York carrying 68kg at $10. Continues to improve. Could feature.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after two months sat on the speed and boxed on steadily finished second of 14 runners at this track in the LR on March 14 over 3600m, on a wet track; 2.5 len behind No Limits Steve carrying 66.5kg at $19. Previously second-up finished fourth of 10 starters at this track on November 15 over 3600m, 4.5 len behind Miss Des Boullats with 66kg at $6.90. Fitter and will be tough to beat.
